Your Anthropic API key isn't just for chatbots — it's a business license. 🔑

Here's how engineers are quietly turning a single API key into real income:

1️⃣ Freelance automation → $500–3K per project
2️⃣ Micro-SaaS → $9–29/mo, even 50 users = real MRR
3️⃣ AI consulting → $150–300/hr

Swipe for the full playbook, then save this for when you're ready to build. 👉
